title: Decision Support Systems in innovative IPM systems
subtitle: Συστήματα υποβοήθησης λήψεως αποφάσεων σε καινοτόμα συστήματα IPM
description: A practice abstract describing the use of decision support systems for integrated pest management in vegetable production. It explains how IoT-based forecasts combining meteorological and historical infection data generate risk indices to enable proactive crop protection and reduce chemical inputs.
